plugins.name: ai-native-methodology
plugins.description: SDLC 4단계 chain harness (legacy 분석 → planning → spec → test → impl). Analysis stage = 한 방향 추출 (7대 산출물 + finding + antipatterns + migration-cautions / Phase 0~6 + BE/FE/DB 분기 + 횡단 a11y/i18n/security/legacy). 위 chain 4 gate + revisit loop + 70~80% 한계 명시.
